source: Invest Like the Best (YouTube) — Watts and wafers
summary: The March/April 2026 NASDAQ selloff was a buying opportunity in AI — valuations reached historically cheap levels relative to the market while AI fundamentals were accelerating

tickers_audited.reasoning: QQQ is an ETF and per the rules, ETF tickers are never direct subjects or beneficiaries of a specific thesis — always tangential. Additionally, Baker's thesis is a broad sector-level valuation call about AI and technology equities as a category; he did not specifically name QQQ or any ETF as the vehicle for this opportunity. The thesis describes a general overweight to AI/tech, not a specific instrument.
